title: LAIF Verified Corpus Manifest Schema
description: Provenance metadata schema for documents in the LAIF verified corpus. Every document ingested into docs/verified/ requires a manifest conforming to this schema.

document_id.description: Unique identifier for this document within the LAIF corpus. Convention: <8-char-hash>-<ShortTitle>.

title.description: Full official title of the document as it appears in the authoritative publication.

jurisdiction.description: Legal or institutional jurisdiction of the document.

descriptions.binding_regulation: Legally binding regulation with direct effect (e.g. EU AI Act)
descriptions.executive_directive: Executive order or equivalent directive — binding on executive agencies, not private actors
descriptions.voluntary_framework: Non-binding framework adopted by voluntary agreement or practice
descriptions.international_recommendation: OECD-type recommendation — non-binding, adopted by member state consensus
descriptions.procurement_standard: Standard enforced through procurement gating rather than statute

authoritative_url.description: Canonical URL of the authoritative publication. Use the official government or international body URL. If unknown, set to null and document in provenance_notes.

retrieval_date_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the document was retrieved. Set to 'NOT_RETRIEVED_FROM_URL' if sourced from a user-supplied file rather than a URL fetch.

retrieval_method.description: How the document was obtained. 'strict_source_mode' variants indicate no training-derived content was used.

publication_date.description: Official publication date of the document. ISO 8601 format preferred; year-only acceptable if month/day unavailable.

version_identifier.description: Official version, edition, or instrument number as it appears in the publication.

sha256_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the raw file stored in docs/verified/raw/. This is the hash of the extracted markdown, not necessarily the original source file. Document any difference in provenance_notes.

raw_filename.description: Filename of the document in docs/verified/raw/. Must exist and hash must match sha256_hash.

extraction_boundaries.description: Documents the scope of text extracted and used in assessment.

full_document.description: True if the entire document was ingested.

sections.description: If partial extraction, list section identifiers included.

notes.description: Any additional notes on extraction scope.

descriptions.RAW_VERBATIM: Text is byte-for-byte identical to the source, no transformation applied.
descriptions.STRUCTURALLY_EXTRACTED: Text extracted from a structured source (PDF, DOCX) with structure-aware tooling; content is verbatim but format has been normalised from the source encoding.
descriptions.NORMALISED_FORMATTING_ONLY: Text is verbatim with only markdown heading levels, pipe tables, or whitespace normalised. No content words altered.

descriptions.PRIMARY_CITABLE: Text is verbatim from the authoritative source and may be cited as primary evidence. Requires NORMALISED_FORMATTING_ONLY or RAW_VERBATIM transformation_status.
descriptions.DERIVED_EXCERPT: Text is a structured extract that preserves substance but may not be verbatim in every detail. Cite with caveat.
descriptions.NON_CITABLE: Text is a paraphrase, summary, or otherwise not suitable for primary citation.

descriptions.AUTHORITATIVE_PRIMARY_SOURCE: The document is itself the authoritative governance instrument (e.g. an international recommendation, regulation, or standard).
descriptions.AUTHORITATIVE_GOVERNMENT_PUBLICATION: The document is an official government publication constituting the operative legal or policy instrument.
descriptions.REGULATORY_PUBLICATION: The document is a regulatory or standards body publication operative within its defined scope.

descriptions.ASSESSED: A full LAIF v1.2 assessment has been completed and is recorded in reports/laif_full_assessment.md.
descriptions.PENDING_ASSESSMENT: Document is ingested but full assessment not yet completed.
descriptions.PENDING_INGESTION: Document has not yet been ingested; manifest entry is a placeholder recording intent.

provenance_notes.description: Optional. Any additional provenance context, limitations, or caveats not captured by other fields.

assessment_reference.description: Optional. Location of the LAIF assessment for this document (e.g. 'reports/laif_full_assessment.md — Assessment 1').

validation_rules: citation_status == PRIMARY_CITABLE requires transformation_status in [RAW_VERBATIM, NORMALISED_FORMATTING_ONLY]
assessment_status == ASSESSED requires assessment_reference to be non-null
sha256_hash must match SHA256 of the file at docs/verified/raw/{raw_filename} when verified
assessment_status == PENDING_INGESTION: sha256_hash, raw_filename, extraction_boundaries, transformation_status may be null
